title: Transparent Inventory Window
description: Changes the window of Player, Horse and Creative to transparent. Dark UI available.
body:
Resource pack which changes the following 3 files:
> assets\minecraft\textures\gui\container\inventory.png
> 
> assets\minecraft\textures\gui\container\horse.png
> 
> assets\minecraft\textures\gui\container\creative_inventory\tab_inventory.png

(Blue background from the gallery images comes from the sky.)

**Dark UI** version based on Vanilla Tweaks Dark UI (c)

**Extra Inventory** version can be found here:
[https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/extra-inventory-patch](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/extra-inventory-patch)
